appliedUpdates.description: Added report-artifact concurrency guidance and a Flow Validator Guidance: Report artifacts section for read-only reporting validation.

notes: Round 1 validated the reporting and cross-area contract assertions from the completed reporting-bug-report-artifacts feature.
This surface was read-only: validation checked the repository QA report, mission handoff note, evidence notes, and cited raw artifacts without starting a new app runtime.
All reporting assertions passed, and validation-state.json now records reporting as the validating milestone for VAL-REPORT-* and VAL-CROSS-*.

override.justification: All reporting and cross-area assertions passed and are recorded in validation-state.json, but repeated full-suite reruns remained unstable because of unrelated pre-existing orchestrator-TUI timeout noise. The QA mission should complete based on the passed assertion set and durable final report artifacts rather than block on unrelated validator instability.
